title: duranta erecta var. grandiflora
intro: Duranta erecta var. grandiflora, also known as the Skyflower or Golden Dewdrop, is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and golden foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
